description: The recommended semantic token surface the app reads. Community themes are FREE-FORM (any selectors, structure, @keyframes, animations) — the hard gate is the safety floor in scripts/validate-theme.mjs, not this list. Setting these tokens on the theme root is the simplest way to recolour the whole app and keeps a theme visually integrated; they are not mandatory. Frozen from the built-in themes' token surface. core/optional/granular are colour values only. --ctp-* (Catppuccin palette) and the global design-system tokens (spacing/radii/elevation-shadows/transitions/fonts) are not part of this surface — the sole exception is the `layout` group below, which exists because overriding the underlying CSS by hand breaks app behaviour.

colorScheme.note: Declared on the same selector (not a custom property). Must match manifest.mode. Drives OS-level form/scrollbar theming and the store dark/light filter.

stateSelectors.note: App state the app exposes on the theme root (the same element as data-theme), for themes to react to — e.g. [data-theme='<id>'][data-playing='true'] { … }. Listed so authors know which states they can target; CSS is otherwise free-form.

core.--accent-dim: Low-alpha accent for fills/backgrounds (e.g. selected row).
core.--accent-2: Secondary accent — second stop of two-colour gradient flourishes.
core.--bg-glass: Translucent glass background (use rgba — sits over blurred surfaces).
core.--text-on-accent: Text/icon colour drawn on top of --accent.
core.--select-arrow: Dropdown chevron, an inline SVG data-URI. The one token whose value is url(data:...). Recolour by changing the stroke=%23RRGGBB hex inside the URI.

optional.--player-title: Player-bar track title colour (falls back to --text-primary).

granular.$comment: Optional per-region override tokens (added 2026-06-06). Each defaults to a base token in the app, so omitting them all is fine — a theme that sets only the core tokens still looks complete. Set one to recolour that region independently, e.g. give the sidebar its own hover without touching every other hover. Colour values only, same as everything else.
granular.--shadow-dropdown: Dropdown / popover drop-shadow colour (falls back to a default shadow).

layout.$comment: Lengths, not colours — the one non-colour group (added 2026-07-14, app >= 1.50.0). These exist because the intuitive way to get the same effect is to override app CSS that carries BEHAVIOUR, which silently breaks a feature. Set the token instead; never override the underlying property.
layout.--rail-shadow-room: Space reserved inside a horizontal album rail's clip box so an outer card shadow can paint (default 8px). A rail scrolls, so it must clip — its `overflow-x: auto` makes `overflow-y` compute to `auto` — and a drop shadow would be cut off at the edges. Raise this if your cards use a larger shadow or glow. DO NOT set `overflow: visible` on `.album-grid` to stop the clipping: that removes the scroll container the rail's prev/next arrows drive, leaving both arrows permanently disabled.
